raw.message: Jogue agora no maior bingo social da América Latina e venha se divertir com os amigos.

hook.summary: Fast-paced bingo gameplay showing rapid number matching and a double line win.
hook.visual_action: Bingo balls roll out and numbers are automatically marked on multiple cards, leading to a 'LINHA DUPLA' celebration.

scene_flow: Rapid bingo ball drawing and automatic marking on four cards.
Celebration of a 'LINHA DUPLA' (Double Line) win.
Transition to an 'H DUPLO' win with slot machine elements.
Big 'JACKPOT' win animation with fireworks and rising coin counter.
Final end card with game logo, character, and download buttons.
audience_proxy: Casual adult players in Brazil who enjoy social bingo and casino-style games.
